title: Mini Clock Tower
description: Adds an adds a mini clock tower to all Plains biomes, decorated and with a villager living inside
body:
**This simple mod adds an adds a mini clock tower to all Plains biomes,**
**decorated and with a villager living inside**

![Tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccc7e8a933b5ced62f12bbe5cba02663ab7950eb.jpeg)



- Hidden Lootroom: A secret chest is hidden somewhere inside the mini clock tower
- Villager to trade with inside
- Spawns in normal and snowy plains biomes


Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
